---
title: "Alice May Gordon"
---

## Alice May Gordon

**Dates:** (b.1853/4)

**Maiden name:** (Brandreth)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>, writer as Mrs J.E.H. Gordon

### Biography

She married (1878) James Edward Henry Gordon, electrical engineer (1852-1893) [His ODNB entry says her surname is  unknown, but the 1881 census has Gordon at 32 Elvaston Place Kensington with wife Alice M and his father-in-law Joseph E F Brandreth, rtd ICS, magistrate. Gordon’s mother was named Brandreth; perhaps they were cousins]

### Letters

- Letter from April 6th 1894
- Letter from Jan 15th 1893
- Letter from July 10th 1892

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
